name: Santa Muerte

sheet.name: Santa Muerte
sheet.background_story:
In a small village 

"light is an island,
darkness a wave,
lapping against the shore,
patient, purposeful,
washing us away

oh, what it must be
to command the tide"

In a gesture from Her Silence, Santa Muerte was appointed to join The Royal Fool's party once he rejoined the forsaken lands.

Eager to continue his study of death, he followed the Mad Party on their renewed journey and bore witness to The Royal Fool's blessed searing of Her Ember. 

As many gathered at the Crow's Den to accompany Julian in tracking the wizard, Merlin, he unfortunately met his end amongst the many traps set at Den.
